  children={"Get active PlanningUnit list for ProductCategory"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/planningUnit/productCategory/{productCategoryId}/active"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



API used to get the list of active PlanningUnits for a ProductCategory

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"productCategoryId","in":"path","description":"productCategoryId that you want the PlanningUnit list for","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}}]}
>

  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Returns the active PlanningUnit list","content":{"text/json":{}}},"403":{"description":"Returns a HttpStatus.FORBIDDEN if the User does not have access","content":{"text/json":{}}},"404":{"description":"Returns a HttpStatus.NOT_FOUND if the productCategoryId specified does not exist","content":{"text/json":{}}},"500":{"description":"Internal error that prevented the retreival of PlanningUnit list","content":{"text/json":{}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
